parsed.explanation: 1. Fixed inconsistent tag usage: Changed all instances of <PRIZE> to <PRICE> for consistency. 2. Corrected malformed Unicode characters in <FORMAT> and text content (e.g., 'gro\u221a\u00bc 8v\u221a\u2264' to 'groß 8vo.'). 3. Closed unclosed <BIBL> tag for 'Memoires de Rochester'. 4. Removed stray Unicode characters (e.g., '\u221a\u2020') that were not part of the actual content. 5. Ensured all <BIBL> elements are properly nested and closed.
